sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38853" key="e(phtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑπητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n38853.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">given to following,</tr_> Metop. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1.115</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
